description_long: This is a small, cylindrical metal can with a pull-tab lid, commonly used for packaging preserved foods such as fish. The can is covered with a printed label featuring Japanese text, nutritional information, and branding, with a prominent illustration of a blonde child holding a fish on one side. The label is primarily black and gold, with some white and yellow highlights, and includes both decorative and informational elements. The top of the can is metallic gold with embossed text and a silver pull-tab for easy opening. The sides of the can display dense blocks of Japanese writing, likely listing ingredients, manufacturer details, and product information. The overall appearance is clean, commercial, and designed to attract attention on a store shelf.
description: A small, gold metal can with a black and gold label, featuring Japanese text and an illustration of a child holding a fish.
description_view_0: This view shows the can's side with dense Japanese text and a barcode, emphasizing product information and manufacturer details.
description_view_1: This view highlights the can's top with the pull-tab and embossed text, as well as more Japanese writing and a small logo.
description_view_2: This view features the illustrated child holding a fish, along with the product name 'ca va?' and additional branding.
description_view_3: This view displays bold Japanese characters in gold on a black background, with more product information text.
attribute_brand_logo: A logo with the text 'ca va?' and a fish graphic is visible on the illustrated side (view 2), in yellow on a black background.
attribute_flavor_indication: Text in Japanese and English ('BLACK PEPPER') and graphics suggest a black pepper flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional and ingredient information is visible in Japanese on the side of the can (views 0 and 3).
attribute_promotional_graphics: An illustrated child holding a fish is prominently displayed on the label (view 2), serving as a mascot or promotional graphic.
